description_long: This object is a dark, metallic shotgun with a compact and angular design, featuring a short barrel and a pronounced, geometric grip. The body is primarily black with subtle silver or gray highlights, and the surface appears to have a slightly reflective, polished finish. The trigger and trigger guard are clearly visible, with the guard having a rounded, elongated shape. The stock is minimal, resembling a pistol grip rather than a full shoulder stock, giving the weapon a more compact profile. The barrel is single and unadorned, with no visible ribbing or venting, and the action mechanism appears to be break-action based on the hinge-like structure above the trigger. Overall, the shotgun has a utilitarian, almost stylized appearance, suitable for close-quarters use in urban environments.
description: A compact, black metallic shotgun with a short barrel, pistol grip, and a slightly reflective finish. The design is angular and utilitarian, with a rounded trigger guard and minimal stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the short barrel, pistol grip, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel opening and the angular, pointed top of the grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the same features from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the alignment of the barrel with the body.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, elongated trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
